seo.title: About HeartLink - Gopi Shah & Alpa Apoorva
seo.description: Meet the co-founders behind HeartLink's private matchmaking practice: family background review, relationship guidance and private introductions for select Indian families.

hero.title: A trusted team for serious families.
hero.description: HeartLink is founded and personally led by Gopi Shah and Alpa Apoorva, with a shared focus on family background, emotional readiness and complete privacy.

trustHeading.title: A public record behind the private work.
trustHeading.description: HeartLink's credibility is built on years of community service, cultural leadership and careful matrimonial guidance.

trustFeature.title: Community work that built real trust.
paragraphs: Through Jwala, Gopi Shah has supported women-focused and humanitarian initiatives across India.
The same values guide HeartLink today: dignity, privacy, respect and responsibility.

curators.name: Gopi Shah
curators.title: Gopi Shah personally guides the HeartLink process.
curators.lead: Gopi Shah has worked across India and the United States in culture, community work and matrimonial service.
paragraphs: Her background includes Home Science from MS University of Baroda, creative direction, Indian craft work and cultural projects across Mumbai, Chicago and Florida.
She has coordinated major cultural work, including a performance at the Great Wall of China, and has received the Dr. Sarojini Naidu International Award.
Before HeartLink, she guided Jeevansathi - Juhu as an honorary matrimonial service for well-regarded Gujarati families. That work was personal, private and never treated like a public database.

Gopi is not an outside adviser studying these circles from a distance. She understands the schools, expectations, family concerns and social nuance her clients bring to the table because she has lived inside the same world.

credentials.title: Global
credentials.description: Work across India and the United States

credentials.title: Honoured
credentials.description: Recipient of the Dr. Sarojini Naidu International Award

curators.name: Alpa Apoorva
curators.title: A good match also needs emotional understanding.
curators.lead: Alpa Apoorva brings relationship coaching and emotional guidance to the HeartLink process.
paragraphs: Alpa is trained as a therapist and relationship coach, working with individuals, couples and families.
She helps people speak clearly about expectations, values, responsibilities and comfort before marriage, not after.
Her role is central to HeartLink's process: helping good families move with more clarity when they are still learning how to understand each other.

credentials.title: Balanced
credentials.description: Support for individuals, couples and families

proofHeading.title: Experience beyond matchmaking.
proofHeading.description: Families trust people who have already carried responsibility in real life. HeartLink carries that record forward.
